abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress
abort.no_devices_found_in_account: No devices present in your account
abort.bluetooth_and_account_mismatch: Bluetooth device not found in your account
abort.api_limit_exceeded: API rate limit has been exceeded. Please try again later.
abort.account_in_use: Your Mammotion account is already in use in another session. Sign out of the Mammotion app and try again.
abort.reauth_entry_missing: The configuration entry no longer exists.

error.login_failed: Login failed. Check your account email and password, then try again.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Mammotion cloud. Check your credentials and network, then try again.
error.no_account_no_ble: No account details entered and no Bluetooth device found. Enter your Mammotion account credentials, or set up a Bluetooth device.
error.wrong_account: The credentials belong to a different Mammotion account.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect to Mammotion
reauth_confirm.description: Enter updated credentials for the same Mammotion account.

data.use_wifi: Use Wi-fi (un-tick and submit to use Bluetooth)

wifi.title: Connect to Wi-Fi
wifi.description: Enter your Mammotion account email or id and password

data.title: Update Configuration
data.prefer_ble_over_wifi: Prefer Bluetooth over Wi-Fi when available
data.full_map_fetch_enabled: Enable full map fetching (cloud) — when off, only area names are fetched

cancel_job.name: Cancel current task
cancel_job.description: Stops the mower and clears the current task.

start_mow.name: Start mowing
start_mow.description: Starts the mowing operation with custom settings.

modify.name: Modify existing job
modify.description: Whether to modify an existing job or start a new one.

collect_grass_frequency.name: Grass collection frequency
collect_grass_frequency.description: Frequency to collect grass (in meters squared). (Yuka)

border_mode.name: Mow order
border_mode.description: Mowing path order (Perimeter first or grid first).

channel_mode.name: Cutting path mode
channel_mode.description: Cutting path (zigzag, chessboard, adaptive zigzag, or perimeter only).

channel_width.name: Path width
channel_width.description: Width of the mowing path (in cm).

toward_included_angle.name: Crossing angle
toward_included_angle.description: When selecting grid change the second angle (default is 90 degrees).

mowing_laps.name: Perimeter mowing laps
mowing_laps.description: Number of laps around the mowing area perimeter.

obstacle_laps.name: No-go zone mowing laps
obstacle_laps.description: Number of laps around No-go zones.

areas.name: Area selection
areas.description: List of areas to mow (represented as integers).

plan_only.name: Plan only
plan_only.description: Generate the mowing plan without starting the job.

set_blade_warning_time.name: Set blade warning time
set_blade_warning_time.description: Set the blade replacement warning time in hours.

hours.name: Hours
hours.description: Warning threshold in hours before blade replacement is recommended.

reset_blade_time.name: Reset blade time
reset_blade_time.description: Reset the blade usage time counter.

get_map_data.name: Get map data
get_map_data.description: Returns the raw map data (areas, SVG tiles, area names) for use with the SVG map card.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion entity belonging to the device.

get_tasks.name: Get tasks
get_tasks.description: Returns normalized read-only mower task/schedule data.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion mower entity belonging to the device.

get_areas.name: Get areas
get_areas.description: Returns normalized read-only mower map area data and task references.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion mower entity belonging to the device.

export_map.name: Export map
export_map.description: Returns read-only mower map data for custom path planning and debugging. Does not send commands to the mower.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion mower entity belonging to the device.

export_tasks.name: Export tasks
export_tasks.description: Returns read-only mower task data and sync metadata for custom path planning and debugging.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion mower entity belonging to the device.

export_runtime_state.name: Export runtime state
export_runtime_state.description: Returns read-only mower runtime telemetry and manual-motion safety blockers used by click/go preflight. Sends no movement commands.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion mower entity belonging to the device.

export_active_route.name: Export active route
export_active_route.description: Returns read-only active mowing route and progress GeoJSON diagnostics.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion mower entity belonging to the device.

validate_custom_path.name: Validate custom path
validate_custom_path.description: Validates a proposed mower-map x/y path without sending movement commands.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion mower entity belonging to the device.

points.name: Points
points.description: List of map-local points, each with x and y.

area_hash.name: Area hash
area_hash.description: Optional area hash to constrain containment validation.

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: Proposed path speed. Used for validation only.

blade_mode.name: Blade mode
blade_mode.description: Must be off. This validation pass does not support blade movement.

preview_custom_path.name: Preview custom path
preview_custom_path.description: Validates a proposed mower-map x/y segment and returns preview data for click/go planning without sending movement commands.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion mower entity belonging to the device.

points.name: Points
points.description: List of map-local points, each with x and y.

area_hash.name: Area hash
area_hash.description: Optional area hash to constrain containment validation.

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: Proposed path speed. Used for validation only.

blade_mode.name: Blade mode
blade_mode.description: Must be off. This preview pass does not support blade movement.

dry_run_custom_path.name: Dry-run custom path
dry_run_custom_path.description: Builds a non-moving custom path execution plan with safety gates, telemetry snapshot, segment headings, and estimated duration. Does not send movement, task, or blade commands.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion mower entity belonging to the device.

points.name: Points
points.description: List of map-local points, each with x and y.

area_hash.name: Area hash
area_hash.description: Optional area hash to constrain containment validation.

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: Proposed path speed. Used for dry-run estimates only.

blade_mode.name: Blade mode
blade_mode.description: Must be off. This dry-run pass does not support blade movement.

heading_offset_degrees.name: Heading offset
heading_offset_degrees.description: Optional correction added to reported mower heading before the simulated controller compares it with the target heading.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: Must be true. Real mower movement is not supported by this service.

execute_custom_path.name: Execute custom path
execute_custom_path.description: Checks readiness for future multi-segment custom path execution and returns the blocked movement plan. This implementation does not send movement, task, blade, or stop commands.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion mower entity belonging to the device.

points.name: Points
points.description: List of map-local points, each with x and y.

area_hash.name: Area hash
area_hash.description: Optional area hash to constrain containment validation.

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: Proposed movement speed for readiness estimates.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: If false, the service records that real execution was requested but still blocks movement until a safe waypoint API is proven.

confirm_blades_off.name: Confirm blades off
confirm_blades_off.description: Operator confirmation that blades should remain off for any future real movement.

allow_manual_velocity.name: Allow manual velocity
allow_manual_velocity.description: Operator opt-in for researching the existing low-level manual movement commands. This service still does not send them.

raw_pymammotion_motion_probe.name: Raw pymammotion motion probe
raw_pymammotion_motion_probe.description: Low-level movement diagnostic endpoint used for guarded stop-nudge and telemetry probes. Real commands require explicit confirmations.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion mower entity belonging to the device.

command.name: Command
command.description: Low-level movement command to test. The click/go card uses send_movement with zero linear and angular speed for stop nudge.

linear_speed.name: Linear speed
linear_speed.description: Linear movement speed for send_movement probes.

angular_speed.name: Angular speed
angular_speed.description: Angular movement speed for send_movement probes.

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: Wrapper speed used for move_forward, move_back, move_left, and move_right commands.

prefer_ble.name: Prefer BLE
prefer_ble.description: When true, prefer BLE over Wi-Fi/local transport when available.

sample_delays.name: Sample delays
sample_delays.description: Seconds after command dispatch to sample telemetry response.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: When true, no movement command is sent.

confirm_clear_area.name: Confirm clear area
confirm_clear_area.description: Required for real movement probes after confirming safe clearance.

raw_pymammotion_execute_vector_segment.name: Raw pymammotion execute vector segment
raw_pymammotion_execute_vector_segment.description: Guarded one-segment endpoint used by click/go dry-run and Real Go flows. Real movement requires explicit confirmations and safety gates.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion mower entity belonging to the device.

points.name: Points
points.description: Exactly two map-local points: current/near-current start and one target point.

area_hash.name: Area hash
area_hash.description: Optional area hash to constrain containment validation.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: When true, return guarded plan/output only and send no movement command.

confirm_clear_area.name: Confirm clear area
confirm_clear_area.description: Required for real movement execution after confirming safe clearance.

prefer_ble.name: Prefer BLE
prefer_ble.description: When true, prefer BLE over Wi-Fi/local transport when available.

linear_speed_fast.name: Fast linear speed
linear_speed_fast.description: Forward pulse speed used when target distance is above the slow threshold.

linear_speed_slow.name: Slow linear speed
linear_speed_slow.description: Forward pulse speed used when target distance is inside the slow threshold.

slow_linear_threshold.name: Slow linear threshold
slow_linear_threshold.description: Distance threshold for switching from fast to slow linear speed.

max_turn_commands.name: Max turn commands
max_turn_commands.description: Safety cap on turn pulses per segment iteration.

max_linear_commands.name: Max linear commands
max_linear_commands.description: Safety cap on forward pulses per segment iteration (legacy fixed budget, used when Max linear pulse ceiling is unset).

max_linear_pulse_ceiling.name: Max linear pulse ceiling
max_linear_pulse_ceiling.description: When set, enables loop-to-tolerance: keep pulsing forward up to this many pulses until the waypoint is reached, instead of the small fixed max-linear-commands budget.

max_no_progress_pulses.name: Max no-progress pulses
max_no_progress_pulses.description: In loop-to-tolerance mode, stop the segment after this many consecutive forward pulses that make no target-directed progress.

linear_distance_ceiling_factor.name: Linear distance ceiling factor
linear_distance_ceiling_factor.description: In loop-to-tolerance mode, stop if cumulative forward travel exceeds the straight-line segment length times this factor (runaway guard).

heading_tolerance_degrees.name: Heading tolerance
heading_tolerance_degrees.description: Heading error tolerance used to classify turn completion.

angular_speed_fast.name: Fast angular speed
angular_speed_fast.description: Turn pulse speed used when heading error is above the slow-turn threshold.

angular_speed_slow.name: Slow angular speed
angular_speed_slow.description: Turn pulse speed used when heading error is inside the slow-turn threshold.

slow_turn_threshold_degrees.name: Slow turn threshold
slow_turn_threshold_degrees.description: Heading-error threshold for switching from fast to slow turn speed.

waypoint_tolerance.name: Waypoint tolerance
waypoint_tolerance.description: Distance from the target that counts as reached.

min_progress_distance.name: Minimum progress distance
min_progress_distance.description: Minimum target-directed distance required to classify linear progress.

min_heading_change_degrees.name: Minimum heading change
min_heading_change_degrees.description: Heading-change threshold used to classify telemetry-confirmed rotation.

max_turn_translation_distance.name: Max turn translation distance
max_turn_translation_distance.description: Maximum translation allowed during turn pulses before the safety gate stops execution.

calibrated_forward_heading_offset_degree.name: Calibrated forward heading offset
calibrated_forward_heading_offset_degree.description: Offset used to convert map heading into reported mower heading for calibrated forward movement.

turn_pulse_duration_ms.name: Turn pulse duration
turn_pulse_duration_ms.description: How long each turn pulse runs before an explicit stop is sent. send_movement is a continuous-velocity command with no built-in duration bound, so this stop is required to keep pulses short and predictable.

linear_pulse_duration_ms.name: Linear pulse duration
linear_pulse_duration_ms.description: How long each forward pulse runs before an explicit stop is sent. send_movement is a continuous-velocity command with no built-in duration bound, so this stop is required to keep pulses short and predictable.

sample_delays.name: Sample delays
sample_delays.description: Seconds after each command to sample telemetry before continuing.

raw_pymammotion_execute_multi_segment.name: Raw pymammotion execute multi segment
raw_pymammotion_execute_multi_segment.description: Guarded chain of 1-3 already-proven one-segment moves (2-4 points), used by the multi-waypoint click/go path builder. Re-validates safety before every segment and stops immediately on the first failure.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion mower entity belonging to the device.

points.name: Points
points.description: Between two and four map-local points: current/near-current start followed by one to three waypoints, executed in order.

area_hash.name: Area hash
area_hash.description: Optional area hash to constrain containment validation.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: When true, return guarded plan/output only and send no movement command.

confirm_clear_area.name: Confirm clear area
confirm_clear_area.description: Required for real movement execution after confirming safe clearance.

prefer_ble.name: Prefer BLE
prefer_ble.description: When true, prefer BLE over Wi-Fi/local transport when available.

max_real_segments.name: Max real segments
max_real_segments.description: Caps how many segments may actually move the mower in one call. Safety is re-checked before every segment; execution stops immediately if this cap is reached or any segment fails.

linear_speed_fast.name: Fast linear speed
linear_speed_fast.description: Forward pulse speed used when target distance is above the slow threshold.

linear_speed_slow.name: Slow linear speed
linear_speed_slow.description: Forward pulse speed used when target distance is inside the slow threshold.

slow_linear_threshold.name: Slow linear threshold
slow_linear_threshold.description: Distance threshold for switching from fast to slow linear speed.

max_turn_commands.name: Max turn commands
max_turn_commands.description: Safety cap on turn pulses per segment iteration.

max_linear_commands.name: Max linear commands
max_linear_commands.description: Safety cap on forward pulses per segment iteration (legacy fixed budget, used when Max linear pulse ceiling is unset).

max_linear_pulse_ceiling.name: Max linear pulse ceiling
max_linear_pulse_ceiling.description: When set, enables loop-to-tolerance: keep pulsing forward up to this many pulses until the waypoint is reached, instead of the small fixed max-linear-commands budget.

max_no_progress_pulses.name: Max no-progress pulses
max_no_progress_pulses.description: In loop-to-tolerance mode, stop the segment after this many consecutive forward pulses that make no target-directed progress.

linear_distance_ceiling_factor.name: Linear distance ceiling factor
linear_distance_ceiling_factor.description: In loop-to-tolerance mode, stop if cumulative forward travel exceeds the straight-line segment length times this factor (runaway guard).

heading_tolerance_degrees.name: Heading tolerance
heading_tolerance_degrees.description: Heading error tolerance used to classify turn completion.

angular_speed_fast.name: Fast angular speed
angular_speed_fast.description: Turn pulse speed used when heading error is above the slow-turn threshold.

angular_speed_slow.name: Slow angular speed
angular_speed_slow.description: Turn pulse speed used when heading error is inside the slow-turn threshold.

slow_turn_threshold_degrees.name: Slow turn threshold
slow_turn_threshold_degrees.description: Heading-error threshold for switching from fast to slow turn speed.

waypoint_tolerance.name: Waypoint tolerance
waypoint_tolerance.description: Distance from a waypoint that counts as reached.

min_progress_distance.name: Minimum progress distance
min_progress_distance.description: Minimum target-directed distance required to classify linear progress.

min_heading_change_degrees.name: Minimum heading change
min_heading_change_degrees.description: Heading-change threshold used to classify telemetry-confirmed rotation.

max_turn_translation_distance.name: Max turn translation distance
max_turn_translation_distance.description: Maximum translation allowed during turn pulses before the safety gate stops execution.

calibrated_forward_heading_offset_degree.name: Calibrated forward heading offset
calibrated_forward_heading_offset_degree.description: Offset used to convert map heading into reported mower heading for calibrated forward movement.

turn_pulse_duration_ms.name: Turn pulse duration
turn_pulse_duration_ms.description: How long each turn pulse runs before an explicit stop is sent. send_movement is a continuous-velocity command with no built-in duration bound, so this stop is required to keep pulses short and predictable.

linear_pulse_duration_ms.name: Linear pulse duration
linear_pulse_duration_ms.description: How long each forward pulse runs before an explicit stop is sent. send_movement is a continuous-velocity command with no built-in duration bound, so this stop is required to keep pulses short and predictable.

sample_delays.name: Sample delays
sample_delays.description: Seconds after each command to sample telemetry before continuing.

manual_velocity_pulse_test.name: Manual velocity pulse test
manual_velocity_pulse_test.description: Dry-runs or performs one tiny manual movement pulse, then samples telemetry and attempts a stop. Real pulses require explicit safety confirmations.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion mower entity belonging to the device.

action.name: Action
action.description: The low-level manual movement action to test.

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: Pulse speed. Real probes are capped to the existing emergency nudge speed.

stop_mode.name: Stop mode
stop_mode.description: How the probe stops after sending the movement command. Firmware mode sends no explicit zero-speed stop and matches the emergency nudge behavior more closely.

stop_delay_ms.name: Stop delay
stop_delay_ms.description: Delay before sending the explicit stop when stop mode is delayed.

post_command_sample_delays.name: Post-command sample delays
post_command_sample_delays.description: Seconds after the movement command to sample telemetry before reporting the measured movement.

use_wifi.name: Use Wi-Fi
use_wifi.description: Use Wi-Fi/local path instead of the default BLE-preferred path.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: When true, no movement command is sent.

confirm_clear_area.name: Confirm clear area
confirm_clear_area.description: Required for a real pulse after confirming the mower has room to move safely.

manual_velocity_segment_test.name: Manual velocity segment test
manual_velocity_segment_test.description: Dry-runs or performs a guarded one-segment movement probe using repeated capped manual pulses with a stop after each pulse. Full path execution remains disabled.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion mower entity belonging to the device.

points.name: Points
points.description: List of map-local points. The probe moves only toward the next unfinished waypoint.

area_hash.name: Area hash
area_hash.description: Optional area hash to constrain containment validation.

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: Pulse speed, capped to the existing emergency nudge speed.

pulse_duration_ms.name: Pulse duration
pulse_duration_ms.description: Duration of each capped pulse in milliseconds.

max_pulses.name: Max pulses
max_pulses.description: Maximum number of stop-and-recheck pulse iterations.

waypoint_tolerance.name: Waypoint tolerance
waypoint_tolerance.description: Distance from a waypoint that counts as reached.

force_action.name: Force action
force_action.description: Optional diagnostic override for the next low-level action. Auto uses the controller decision.

heading_offset_degrees.name: Heading offset
heading_offset_degrees.description: Optional correction added to reported mower heading before the controller compares it with the target heading.

min_progress_distance.name: Minimum progress distance
min_progress_distance.description: Distance threshold used to classify telemetry-confirmed movement.

no_progress_limit.name: No progress limit
no_progress_limit.description: Stop after this many consecutive pulses without telemetry-confirmed progress.

min_heading_change_degrees.name: Minimum heading change
min_heading_change_degrees.description: Heading-change threshold used to classify telemetry-confirmed rotation.

use_wifi.name: Use Wi-Fi
use_wifi.description: Use Wi-Fi/local path instead of the default BLE-preferred path.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: When true, no movement command is sent.

confirm_blades_off.name: Confirm blades off
confirm_blades_off.description: Required for a real segment probe.

confirm_clear_area.name: Confirm clear area
confirm_clear_area.description: Required for a real segment probe after confirming the mower has room to move safely.

experimental_execute_segment.name: Experimental execute segment
experimental_execute_segment.description: Performs one guarded two-point movement segment using capped manual pulses. This is experimental, requires explicit real-execution confirmations, stops after each pulse, and stops immediately when target-directed progress is lost.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion mower entity belonging to the device.

points.name: Points
points.description: Exactly two map-local points: current/near-current start and one target point.

area_hash.name: Area hash
area_hash.description: Optional area hash to constrain containment validation.

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: Pulse speed, capped to the existing emergency nudge speed.

pulse_duration_ms.name: Pulse duration
pulse_duration_ms.description: Duration of each capped pulse in milliseconds.

max_pulses.name: Max pulses
max_pulses.description: Maximum number of stop-and-recheck pulse iterations. Experimental execution is capped at three.

waypoint_tolerance.name: Waypoint tolerance
waypoint_tolerance.description: Distance from the target that counts as reached.

heading_offset_degrees.name: Heading offset
heading_offset_degrees.description: Optional correction added to reported mower heading before the controller compares it with the target heading.

min_progress_distance.name: Minimum progress distance
min_progress_distance.description: Minimum target-directed movement required after each pulse.

min_heading_change_degrees.name: Minimum heading change
min_heading_change_degrees.description: Heading-change threshold used to classify telemetry-confirmed rotation.

use_wifi.name: Use Wi-Fi
use_wifi.description: Use Wi-Fi/local path instead of the default BLE-preferred path.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: Must be false. Use manual_velocity_segment_test for dry-run planning.

confirm_blades_off.name: Confirm blades off
confirm_blades_off.description: Required and must be true for experimental execution.

confirm_clear_area.name: Confirm clear area
confirm_clear_area.description: Required and must be true after confirming the mower has room to move safely.

experimental_execute_segment_burst.name: Experimental execute segment burst
experimental_execute_segment_burst.description: Performs one guarded two-point movement segment using capped pulse bursts. After each burst it waits for delayed cumulative telemetry before deciding whether another burst is safe.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion mower entity belonging to the device.

points.name: Points
points.description: Exactly two map-local points: current/near-current start and one target point.

area_hash.name: Area hash
area_hash.description: Optional area hash to constrain containment validation.

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: Pulse speed, capped to the existing emergency nudge speed.

pulse_duration_ms.name: Pulse duration
pulse_duration_ms.description: Duration of each capped pulse in milliseconds.

pulses_per_burst.name: Pulses per burst
pulses_per_burst.description: Number of stopped manual pulses to send before waiting for cumulative telemetry.

max_bursts.name: Max bursts
max_bursts.description: Maximum number of burst-and-wait iterations. Experimental execution is capped at three.

waypoint_tolerance.name: Waypoint tolerance
waypoint_tolerance.description: Distance from the target that counts as reached.

heading_offset_degrees.name: Heading offset
heading_offset_degrees.description: Optional correction added to reported mower heading before the controller compares it with the target heading.

heading_offset_candidates.name: Heading offset candidates
heading_offset_candidates.description: Optional list of heading offsets to evaluate before each burst. The controller chooses the candidate with the safest target-directed command.

stop_mode.name: Stop mode
stop_mode.description: How each pulse is stopped during a burst. Firmware mode omits the explicit zero-speed stop.

stop_delay_ms.name: Stop delay
stop_delay_ms.description: Delay before sending the explicit stop when stop mode is delayed.

min_progress_distance.name: Minimum progress distance
min_progress_distance.description: Minimum target-directed movement required after each burst.

min_heading_change_degrees.name: Minimum heading change
min_heading_change_degrees.description: Heading-change threshold used to classify telemetry-confirmed rotation.

allow_unproven_turns.name: Allow unproven turns
allow_unproven_turns.description: Allow turn commands outside the proven heading window. Keep disabled for safer operation.

calibrated_forward_heading_degrees.name: Calibrated forward heading
calibrated_forward_heading_degrees.description: Reported heading that corresponds to map-forward motion for this mower calibration.

calibrated_forward_heading_tolerance_deg.name: Calibrated forward heading tolerance
calibrated_forward_heading_tolerance_deg.description: Allowed deviation from calibrated forward heading before turn commands are treated as unproven.

cumulative_sample_delays.name: Cumulative sample delays
cumulative_sample_delays.description: Seconds after each pulse burst to sample telemetry before deciding whether to continue.

use_wifi.name: Use Wi-Fi
use_wifi.description: Use Wi-Fi/local path instead of the default BLE-preferred path.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: Must be false. Use manual_velocity_cumulative_pulse_test for dry-run planning.

confirm_blades_off.name: Confirm blades off
confirm_blades_off.description: Required and must be true for experimental execution.

confirm_clear_area.name: Confirm clear area
confirm_clear_area.description: Required and must be true after confirming the mower has room to move safely.

manual_velocity_multi_pulse_test.name: Manual velocity multi-pulse test
manual_velocity_multi_pulse_test.description: Dry-runs or performs a guarded multi-pulse movement probe. Each capped pulse is followed by stop, delayed telemetry sampling, a no-progress safety gate, and telemetry-quality degradation checks. Full path execution remains disabled.

waypoint_tolerance.name: Waypoint tolerance
waypoint_tolerance.description: Distance from a waypoint that counts as reached.

force_action.name: Force action
force_action.description: Optional diagnostic override for the next low-level action. Auto uses the controller decision.

stop_mode.name: Stop mode
stop_mode.description: How each pulse is stopped. Firmware mode omits the explicit zero-speed stop.

stop_delay_ms.name: Stop delay
stop_delay_ms.description: Delay before sending the explicit stop when stop mode is delayed.

heading_offset_degrees.name: Heading offset
heading_offset_degrees.description: Optional correction added to reported mower heading before the controller compares it with the target heading.

min_progress_distance.name: Minimum progress distance
min_progress_distance.description: Distance threshold used to classify telemetry-confirmed movement.

no_progress_limit.name: No progress limit
no_progress_limit.description: Stop after this many consecutive pulses without telemetry-confirmed progress.

min_heading_change_degrees.name: Minimum heading change
min_heading_change_degrees.description: Heading-change threshold used to classify telemetry-confirmed rotation.

use_wifi.name: Use Wi-Fi
use_wifi.description: Use Wi-Fi/local path instead of the default BLE-preferred path.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: When true, no movement command is sent.

confirm_blades_off.name: Confirm blades off
confirm_blades_off.description: Required for a real multi-pulse probe.

confirm_clear_area.name: Confirm clear area
confirm_clear_area.description: Required for a real multi-pulse probe after confirming the mower has room to move safely.

manual_velocity_cumulative_pulse_test.name: Manual velocity cumulative pulse test
manual_velocity_cumulative_pulse_test.description: Dry-runs or performs a bounded burst of stopped manual pulses, then waits once for delayed telemetry to measure cumulative movement. Full path execution remains disabled.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion mower entity belonging to the device.

points.name: Points
points.description: Exactly two map-local points: current/start and diagnostic target.

area_hash.name: Area hash
area_hash.description: Optional area hash to constrain containment validation.

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: Pulse speed, capped to the existing emergency nudge speed.

pulse_duration_ms.name: Pulse duration
pulse_duration_ms.description: Duration of each capped pulse in milliseconds.

max_pulses.name: Max pulses
max_pulses.description: Maximum number of pulses to send before cumulative telemetry sampling.

waypoint_tolerance.name: Waypoint tolerance
waypoint_tolerance.description: Distance from the target that counts as reached before sending another pulse.

force_action.name: Force action
force_action.description: Optional diagnostic override for the low-level action. Auto uses the controller decision.

heading_offset_degrees.name: Heading offset
heading_offset_degrees.description: Optional correction added to reported mower heading before the controller compares it with the target heading.

heading_offset_candidates.name: Heading offset candidates
heading_offset_candidates.description: Optional list of heading offsets to evaluate before each pulse burst. The controller chooses the candidate with the safest target-directed command.

min_progress_distance.name: Minimum progress distance
min_progress_distance.description: Distance threshold used to classify telemetry-confirmed movement.

min_heading_change_degrees.name: Minimum heading change
min_heading_change_degrees.description: Heading-change threshold used to classify telemetry-confirmed rotation.

cumulative_sample_delays.name: Cumulative sample delays
cumulative_sample_delays.description: Seconds after the pulse burst to sample telemetry before making the cumulative movement decision.

use_wifi.name: Use Wi-Fi
use_wifi.description: Use Wi-Fi/local path instead of the default BLE-preferred path.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: When true, no movement command is sent.

confirm_blades_off.name: Confirm blades off
confirm_blades_off.description: Required for a real cumulative pulse probe.

confirm_clear_area.name: Confirm clear area
confirm_clear_area.description: Required for a real cumulative pulse probe after confirming the mower has room to move safely.

manual_velocity_heading_calibration_test.name: Manual velocity heading calibration test
manual_velocity_heading_calibration_test.description: Dry-runs or performs one guarded movement pulse and compares reported heading with the measured movement vector. Full path execution remains disabled.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion mower entity belonging to the device.

action.name: Action
action.description: The low-level movement action to use for calibration.

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: Pulse speed, capped to the existing emergency nudge speed.

stop_mode.name: Stop mode
stop_mode.description: How the calibration pulse is stopped. Firmware mode omits the explicit zero-speed stop.

stop_delay_ms.name: Stop delay
stop_delay_ms.description: Delay before sending the explicit stop when stop mode is delayed.

post_command_sample_delays.name: Post-command sample delays
post_command_sample_delays.description: Seconds after the movement command to sample telemetry for heading calibration.

use_wifi.name: Use Wi-Fi
use_wifi.description: Use Wi-Fi/local path instead of the default BLE-preferred path.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: When true, no movement command is sent.

confirm_blades_off.name: Confirm blades off
confirm_blades_off.description: Required for a real heading calibration pulse.

confirm_clear_area.name: Confirm clear area
confirm_clear_area.description: Required for a real heading calibration pulse after confirming the mower has room to move safely.

min_progress_distance.name: Minimum progress distance
min_progress_distance.description: Translation threshold required to infer movement-vector heading.

min_heading_change_degrees.name: Minimum heading change
min_heading_change_degrees.description: Heading-change threshold used to classify telemetry-confirmed rotation.

svg_add.name: Add SVG tile
svg_add.description: Send a new SVG tile to the device map. Returns the device-assigned hash.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion entity belonging to the device.

area_hash.name: Area hash
area_hash.description: Hash of the parent mowing area.

svg_data.name: SVG data
svg_data.description: Raw SVG markup to display on the map.

svg_file_name.name: Filename
svg_file_name.description: Filename stored on the device (default: pattern.svg).

rotate.name: Rotation
rotate.description: Rotation in radians (CCW-positive in device ENU frame).

base_width_m.name: Width (m)
base_width_m.description: Physical width of one tile unit in metres (2.5 for Luba 1/Yuka, 4.0 for Luba 2).

base_height_m.name: Height (m)
base_height_m.description: Physical height of one tile unit in metres.

x_move.name: X position
x_move.description: X coordinate override (metres). Defaults to area centroid.

y_move.name: Y position
y_move.description: Y coordinate override (metres). Defaults to area centroid.

svg_update.name: Update SVG tile
svg_update.description: Replace an existing SVG tile on the device map. Use the device_hash returned by svg_add.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion entity belonging to the device.

device_hash.name: Device hash
device_hash.description: Hash assigned by the device when the tile was first added.

area_hash.name: Area hash
area_hash.description: Hash of the parent mowing area.

base_width_m.name: Width (m)
base_width_m.description: Physical width of one tile unit in metres.

base_height_m.name: Height (m)
base_height_m.description: Physical height of one tile unit in metres.

svg_delete.name: Delete SVG tile
svg_delete.description: Remove an SVG tile from the device map by its device-assigned hash.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion entity belonging to the device.

device_hash.name: Device hash
device_hash.description: Hash assigned by the device when the tile was added.

area_hash.name: Area hash
area_hash.description: Hash of the parent mowing area.

rename_task.name: Rename task
rename_task.description: Rename an existing schedule (mower or pool cleaner). Target the task button entity for the schedule you want to change.

name.name: New name
name.description: New display name for the task.

set_task_enabled.name: Enable / disable task
set_task_enabled.description: Toggle a schedule's enable flag without deleting it. For mowers this rewrites the plan with reserved[2] set; for Spino it sets the (inverted) enable field.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: True to enable the schedule, false to disable it.

delete_task.name: Delete task
delete_task.description: Permanently delete the schedule identified by the targeted task button entity.

copy_task.name: Copy task
copy_task.description: Duplicate a schedule under a new id. The new task name defaults to 'Copy-N' (next free slot) when omitted.

edit_task.name: Edit task
edit_task.description: Modify any subset of a schedule's fields. Unspecified fields keep their stored value (round-trip from the device). Mower-only and Spino-only fields are described per field.

weeks.name: Weekdays
weeks.description: List of weekday integers (0 = Sunday … 6 = Saturday) the schedule runs on.

trigger_type.name: Trigger type
trigger_type.description: 0 = weekly, 1 = day interval, 2 = date, 3 = run once.

day.name: Day interval
day.description: Interval in days when trigger_type is 1 (DAY).

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: Mower: driving speed (float). Spino: fixed32 speed value (int).

route_spacing.name: Route spacing
route_spacing.description: Mower-only: spacing between mow lines in cm.

zone_hashs.name: Zone hashes
zone_hashs.description: Mower-only: list of area hashes (fixed64) covered by this schedule.

work_mode.name: Work mode
work_mode.description: Spino-only: 0 = recharge, 1 = AUTO, 2 = FLOOR, 3 = WALL, 4 = ECO, 5 = LINE, 6 = CUSTOM.

sub_mode.name: Sub-modes
sub_mode.description: Spino-only: list of APP_WORK values for multi-stage cleaning.

starttime.name: Start timestamp
starttime.description: Spino-only: unix timestamp (seconds) for the start of the cleaning session.

create_task.name: Create task
create_task.description: Create a brand-new schedule on the targeted device. The integration auto-generates a fresh plan id / jobid. Fields are the union of mower and Spino schedule properties; the relevant subset is applied based on the device kind.

name.name: Name
name.description: Display name for the new schedule.

weeks.name: Weekdays
weeks.description: List of weekday integers (0 = Sunday … 6 = Saturday).

trigger_type.name: Trigger type
trigger_type.description: 0 = weekly, 1 = day interval, 2 = date, 3 = run once.

zone_hashs.name: Zone hashes
zone_hashs.description: Mower-only: list of area hashes covered.

refresh_tasks.name: Refresh tasks
refresh_tasks.description: Re-fetch every schedule from the targeted device. Use after delete-all or to recover from a missed update.

start_task.name: Start task
start_task.description: Run a stored schedule immediately (also known as 'start schedule'). Mower-only — the Spino pool cleaner has no equivalent command, so targeting a Spino task entity raises an error.

camera_temporarily_unavailable.message: The mower camera is temporarily unavailable. Check the mower network connection and try again.

mower_target_not_found.message: Select an entity belonging to a Mammotion mower.

task_not_found.message: Task {plan_id} could not be found on the device. Refresh the schedule and try again.

dock_failed.message: Failed to send the mower to the dock.

dock_cancel_failed.message: Failed to stop the mower returning to the dock.

command_failed.message: Failed to send command to the mower.

api_limit_exceeded.message: API rate limit has been exceeded.

account_in_use.message: Your Mammotion account is already active in another session. Sign out of the Mammotion app and try again.

cloud_setup_failed.message: Unable to connect to the Mammotion cloud. Check your network and try reloading the integration.

start_task_unsupported_on_spino.message: Starting a schedule on demand is not supported on the Spino pool cleaner — the device firmware has no execute-now command for stored plans.
